goal: Install a teacher-led 10-15 minute nucleus class with physical teacher movement, follow checks, functional overlays, questions, neutral lighting, subtitles, and optional Roblox audio.
class_plan: Teacher greets the player at a near-nucleus spawn.
Teacher moves physically through nucleus topics and blocks advancement if the player swims too far away.
Structure lessons cover envelope, ER continuity, pores, nucleoplasm, lamina, chromatin, nucleolus, RNA export, translation, protein routing, and mitosis.
Functional overlays animate DNA opening, transcription, RNA processing, mRNA export, ribosome subunit export, translation, protein handoff, transport cargo, and mitosis.
Short checks validate pores, mRNA export, gene-expression order, and nucleolus role.
